task_completion.description: Open the original sample project file in the project management software.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The project management software (e.g., ProjectLibre) is open and displays a loaded project with multiple tasks (like a Commercial Construction template). The window title or open dialog may show 'sample_project.xml'.

task_completion.description: Access the project information or settings dialog.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Project Information' or similar settings dialog box is open on the screen, displaying project-level fields such as Start Date and Manager.

task_completion.description: Update the project Start Date to February 3, 2025.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the project information dialog, the 'Start Date' field is explicitly set to February 3, 2025 (or 02/03/2025, 2025-02-03 depending on the locale format).

task_completion.description: Update the Manager field to 'Sarah Chen'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the project information dialog, the 'Manager' text field is filled with the exact name 'Sarah Chen'.

task_completion.description: Save or export the updated project as an XML file to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' or 'Export' dialog showing the file being saved as 'updated_project.xml' in the '~/Projects' (/home/ga/Projects) directory with the XML file type selected, OR a terminal/file manager window showing the newly created 'updated_project.xml' file in the correct directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface of a project management tool (like ProjectLibre) rather than a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the GUI of a project management application being used to make changes, not a terminal text editor (like nano/vim) or a Python script directly editing the XML tags.

integrity.description: The agent loaded the actual project containing tasks rather than creating a blank project.
integrity.visual_evidence: The background GUI should show a populated task list or Gantt chart (at least 15 tasks visible), confirming the original sample project was used.

integrity.description: The agent used the application's save/export functionality to generate the output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Save As' or 'Export' dialog of the project management software is visible, indicating the file was generated by the software and not simply copied via terminal commands.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The original project is located at /home/ga/Projects/samples/sample_project.xml. The target Start Date is February 3, 2025 (2025-02-03) and the Manager must be 'Sarah Chen'. The final output must be saved to /home/ga/Projects/updated_project.xml. The project should contain at least 15 tasks (the original contains 146).
